data.body: Step 1 implemented and committed (refactor commit on main). search_states -> ticket_reducer/search.py; find_ready_tickets -> ticket_graph/_ready.py; scripts are now shims. 43 interface parity tests + 7 bash ready-dispatcher tests + unit tests green, identical to pre-change baseline. NOTE: close is gated by verify.require_verdict_for_close — leaving in_progress pending verdict/your call.
